title: Flying cars and 5-minute charges: China's EV industry sees opportunity in Iran crisis
summary_full: As the US-Iran has sent the world scrambling for fuel, China is positioned to benefit from its rapid shift into electric vehicles.
summary_public: As the US-Iran has sent the world scrambling for fuel, China is positioned to benefit from its rapid shift into electric vehicles.
